description: CompositionWhite T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, short sleeves with brand logo printed on the left sleeve, stitch detailing on the shoulders and a brand print appliqued on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsGet casual with comfort in this T-shirt from nike. The cotton material keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
